top.text: Plan 23:00–23:45: Lie in bed scrolling through photos of them from college, wondering where things changed

top.text: Plan 15:45–16:30: Deliver cookies, linger outside the florist’s shop to catch up with Maria about the rumored café opening across town
Tom said to Ana: "“Hey Ana—coffee black, usual spot. And… uh, have you seen Maya around this morning?”"
Ana said to Tom: "“Maya? She dashed past the bakery at eight—hair half-braided, clutching that lavender tote, looked like she was late for something *very* important… or avoiding someone.”"
